titleStmt.title: SII 15.17: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 17. (B.K. No. 125 of 1926-27.) KURTAKŌṬI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Narasiṁhasvāmi.
This is dated the 14th regnal year of the king, Kāḷayukti, Vaiśākha-pāurṇimā, Tuesday, lunar eclipse. This date corresponds to 1138 A.D., April 26, Tuesday.

It records a gift of income from taxes made by Taḷāṟa Boppa-nāyaka with the approval of the Two Hundred for burning a perpetual lamp in front of the god Narasiṁha. Kuṟitakōṭe is mentioned as agrahāra. The inscription is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
damaged

śrita janakalpa vṟikṣa
pratipāḷakarappa śrīmanmahāgrahāraṁ
kuṟitakōṭeyūroḍeyapramukhavaśēṣa mahājanaṁga
svasti śrīmaccāḷukya bhūlōkava¨rṣada 14 neya kālayu
kta saṁvatsarada vaiśākhada pau¨rṇnamāse maṁgaḷavāra sōmagraha
ṇadaṁdu taḷāṟaṁ boppanāyakaṁ śrīmadinnū¨rvvara prasā
disi poṟagaṇiṁ ba naḍeve kuḷa
¨rma mattahoragaṇiṁ banda ṇḍiya ma maṁ śrīmannā
rasiṁhadēvara santataṁ nandādīvige naḍevantāgi biṭṭanī dha¨rmamaninnū¨rvvaruṁ va[¨rṣaṁ]
prati naḍavantappa taḷāṟanuṁ svadha¨rmmaṁ pratipāḷisuvarī dha¨rmmamanāro
¨rvvaruṁ kiḍalīyade pratipāḷisidava¨rgge gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra
prayāge Ā¨rgghyatī¨rttha modalāgi ppa puṇyakṣētradali sāyira
kapilegaḷa vēdapāragarappa brāhma
ṇa¨rgge koṭṭantappa puṇyamaneyduvaru . [I] dha¨rmmamanārō¨rbba naḷidātanā pu
ṇyakṣētra sāyira brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāyira kepileymaṁ konda
paṁcamahāpātakamakku .
Digital edition of SII 15.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
